'''Sacorria''' was an [[orange giant]]<ref name="CatCW" /> located in the [[Corellian sector/Legends|Corellian sector]] of the [[Core Worlds/Legends|Core Worlds]].<ref name="EAOC" /> It was the primary [[Star/Legends|star]] of the [[Sacorrian system]].<ref name="CatCW" />
